info.name: Grimoire
info.summary: A self-hosted virtual tabletop for D&D and other TTRPGs
info.description:
Grimoire is a virtual tabletop (VTT) built into Nextcloud. Run campaigns and live sessions with shared 2D battlemaps and a physics-driven 3D mode where you can load glTF character models and build maps in three dimensions.
## Features
- Campaigns and scenes, stored in your own Nextcloud - 2D mode: maps, tokens, drawings, fog of war, grid (square/hex) - 3D mode: glTF/GLB models, 3D map building, orbit camera - Physics 3D dice (d4–d20) with real settle-and-read results - 2D dice viewport: roll physics dice without leaving the battlemap - Tools: pointer, grab, measurement, area-of-effect, draw, fog, build - Token health system with DM-controlled HP bars - Player permissions (per-layer create/update/delete, owner-only tokens) - Real-time multiplayer rooms (signed room tokens + polling fallback) - Addon/extension system with a sandboxed GRIM SDK - Asset library backed by Nextcloud Files
info.author: Roboman124
